chapter_title: Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws
text: Wherever in this division “department” occurs, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 1. Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws [21000 - 21300]
#### Article 1. Definitions [21000 - 21001]
##### § 21000

Wherever in this division “department” occurs, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Wherever in this division “department” occurs, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
